label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Company as it appears on the record of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Top blank labeled '(Name of Limited Liability Company as it appears on the record of the Secretary of State)' — the LLC's currently-registered legal name, used by the SOS to look up the existing entity.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited liability company has been changed to (if no change, so indicate): ___
rationale: FIRST blank captures the post-restatement name. Filer enters either a new name (if changed) or 'no change' / repeats the existing name (if unchanged). Both 'name' (top) and 'new name' (FIRST) bind to entity.name; for synth-driven fills with no name change, both widgets receive the same value.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date of filing of the initial certificate of formation: ___
rationale: Date the original (pre-restatement) certificate of formation was filed; required to identify the LLC being restated.

label_verbatim: THIRD: Designation as a low profit LLC (Check only if applicable): This is a low-profit limited liability company pursuant to 31 MRSA §1611...
rationale: Boolean elect-in for L3C status under 31 MRSA §1611, with statutory qualifications A–D. Same canonical key as on LLC_MLLC-6 (formation form).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Designation as a professional limited liability company (Check only if applicable): This is a professional limited liability company* formed pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A...
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional-LLC status under 13 MRSA Ch 22-A. Same canonical key as on LLC_MLLC-6.
Free-text professional-services list (only when entity.is_professional_llc = true).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The Registered Agent is a: [ ] Commercial Registered Agent
rationale: Mutually-exclusive registered-agent type = 'commercial'.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The Registered Agent is a: [ ] Noncommercial Registered Agent
rationale: Mutually-exclusive registered-agent type = 'noncommercial'.
Maine SOS CRA Public Number (required only when registered_agent.type = 'commercial').
Name line for commercial registered agent (single canonical key shared with noncommercial path).
Name line for noncommercial registered agent (alternate path; same canonical key as 'agent' — only one row is filled at a time per the FIFTH selection).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address (street, city, state, zip combined). Form explicitly forbids a P.O. Box for this line.
Optional single-line mailing address.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: Other matters the members determine to include are set forth in the attached Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof.
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for any additional restatement amendments. Distinct from entity.statement_of_authority_exhibit_letter on LLC_MLLC-6 (formation), because on a restated certificate the SEVENTH paragraph captures 'other matters' = ongoing restatement amendments rather than the initial statement of authority.
Date the restated certificate is signed by the authorized person(s).

label_verbatim: (type or print name and capacity) [signer slot 1, paired with first signature line]
rationale: First authorized person's combined name and capacity. Per-officer signer pattern (Shape D variant) keyed on authorized_person_N.* — distinct from filing.signer.* because the form provides 3 parallel signer slots, not a single filer.

label_verbatim: (type or print name and capacity) [signer slot 2]
rationale: Second authorized person's combined name and capacity (optional second signer).

label_verbatim: (type or print name and capacity) [signer slot 3]
rationale: Third authorized person's combined name and capacity (optional third signer). NOTE: this widget's field-id has a space before the digit ('name and capacity 3') unlike slots 1 and 2 ('name and capacity1', 'name and capacity2') — preserve this exactly when binding.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total filing fee enclosed (USD); base $80 per page 0 header plus expedite premium.
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Persistent annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
